creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to shamil from comment #1)
> i installed geany on xfce4 then i tried to open a file with geany but when i
> cilicked right "open with geany" not shownalso i tried to "open with other
> application".i opende context menu but geany not exist in application list.

I doubt if the problem is with the geany port. Geany provides desktop entry (installed to /usr/local/share/applications/geany.desktop), which contains info about supported file types, it's up to DE how to use this info. I'm sure XFCE supports desktop entries, but I don't use it myself. I pass this PR to xfce@ team.
